excerpts.excerpt:
TWO ATTRACTIVE TOWNIE GIRLS (LATE TEENS) wearing high-street
fashions sashay past.
HANNAH
S’cuse me. Have you ever been to
live wrestlin’?

The TOWNIE’s look down their noses.
TOWNIE
(sneery)
No.
TOWNIE 2
Who watches wrestling?
TOWNIE
Stupid people who think it’s real.
Hannah looks hurt.
TOWNIE 2
Are you a wrestler?
HANNAH
No.
(re: Raya)
She is. She’s amazing.
TOWNIE
But she’s a girl.
(looking Raya up and down)
Aren’t you?

RAYA
Uggghhh. Paulie!
Raya spins out of the HALF-NELSON as Paulie covers his groin.
ZAK
Fifty press-ups.

PAULIE
For having a stiffy?
ZAK
No. For being sexually aroused by
my sister. How desperate are you?
More LAUGHTER, as Raya punches Zak in the arm. Paulie drops
to the mat. Everyone begins to count his PUSH UPS -- as Raya
sees something -- gestures -- Zak follows her gaze --
-- Calum is making his way into the gym.
Zak smiles.
INT. BACK OFFICE - SAME TIME
Ricky is sitting at a desk, speaking on an old LAND-LINE
TELEPHONE. Julia sits doing paperwork.
RICKY
(into phone)
You’re killin’ us, Glenn, it ain’t
worth him makin’ the trip for
that... Wait, let me ask him...

RAYA
‘Cause he told her he’s gonna be
rich and famous.

ZAK
No. ‘Cause I’m kind and
considerate... except in the
bedroom, when I’m an animal.
RAYA
Ugghhh!
RICKY
That’s my boy! Learned from
the master.
ZAK (CONT’D)
And can we keep the effin’ and
jeffin’ to a fuckin’ minimum?
Courtney’s dad don’t use cusswords.
RICKY
Who is her dad? The Archbishop of
fuckin’ Canterbury?
ZAK
Please, can we just try and act
normal? For Courtney’s sake.

RAYA
Movies even.
JULIA
You should see her in the ring.
It's like watchin’ a brilliant
ballet dancer. And the biggest buzz
I get is when people say to me,
“Don't she look just like you?”
RICKY
When they’re stars and they come
back, we’ll have full houses every
night, shift a ton of merchandise,
expand the trainin’ school, sky’s
the limit.
(to Hugh)
You should buy shares in us, mate.

Hugh LAUGHS FAINTLY.
RICKY (CONT’D)
Seriously, I’ve got the paperwork
here.
ZAK
Dad...

Everyone APPLAUDS. Dwayne smiles --
HUTCH
We call that what?
Zak’s hand is in the air.
ZAK
A promo.
HUTCH
Dwayne’ll tell ya, apart from your
skill in the ring, promos are how
you connect with the crowd.
DWAYNE
Right. This is a fictionalized
world but the fans can tell if
you’re being fake. You go over when
the fans connect with the real
you.
The Rock is me, but with the bass,
the treble, the volume dialled way
up.
Hutch points at Zak.
HUTCH
What’s your name?

The Strays crowd around Raya to congratulate her.
Zak watches, stoically, as they hoist her on their shoulders
and parade her around the gym.
DISSOLVE TO:
EXT. NORWICH - EVERYWHERE.
Clouds drag themselves across a grey sky.
INT. RAYA’S BEDROOM - DAY37 37
Raya is finishing packing her SUITCASE.
On her bed sits a vintage ULTIMATE WARRIOR WRESTLING BUDDIES
CUDDLY TOY from the 90s. Raya picks up Ultimate Warrior, puts
him in her case.
She looks around her TEENAGE ROOM for the last time. Looks at
PHOTOS on a shelf: the family in wrestling costumes, striking
FIGHTING POSES; Raya with Zak, wearing his PINK POWER RANGER
OUTFIT -- from the night Raya first got in the ring.
She puts both pictures in her case -- and snaps it closed.
EXT. KNIGHT HOUSE - BACKYARD - DAY
CLOSE ON ZAK -- sitting on the old BENCH PRESS, taking drags
on a cigarette.
Julia appears at the back door -- Raya behind her.
JULIA
Zak, we're off.

HUTCH (V.O.)
Zak, we reviewed your new tape, and
we were all very impressed.
ZAK (V.O.)
Great. Thank you.

I/E. VAN - NIGHT63 63
Rain pours. The van sits on the hard shoulder of a dual
carriageway. Hazard lights on.
INTERCUT with Hutch.
HUTCH
But... I’m afraid the answer is
still no.
ZAK
Can I speak to someone else,
please? Someone higher up?
HUTCH
I’m afraid not.
ZAK
Mate, you don’t understand. This is
my dream.
HUTCH
I do understand, but the decision's
been made. I’m sorry.

Hugh and Daphne do as they’re told -- drop to the ground,
hide beneath the table.
The DEBT COLLECTOR peers in through the window.

DEBT COLLECTOR
I know you’re in there. I can see
feet behind the table.
JULIA
Daph, pull your fuckin’ feet in,
luv.
Daphne does what she’s told -- and pulls her fuckin’ feet in.
Raya looks down at her nephew in her arms. Looks up -- sees
Zak staring at them both.
I/E. WAW VAN - DAY
Zak driving. Up ahead he sees a group of STRAYS -- among them
Paulie -- waiting to be picked up.
He slows the van some distance away. Considers. Turns the car
down a side street to avoid them.
EXT. PARK - DAY75 75
Calum sits on his lonely swing, listening out for the van. He
PERKS UP as he hears a vehicle -- but it’s merely a POST-VAN
passing by.
EXT. STREET - AS BEFORE
Paulie looks at his watch, checks up and down the street.

RAYA
Fuck you, Zak!
ZAK
You wanted my help tellin’ em --
you’re welcome.
Zak walks off. Ricky turns on Raya.
RICKY
You're goin’ back if I have to drag
you to the States myself.
RAYA
You’re an alchy ex-con -- they
won't let you in.
RICKY
Watch your fuckin’ mouth!
JULIA
(intervening)
Rick!
RICKY
You’re going back!
Julia steps forward.
JULIA
We know it's tough, darlin’, but
this is what you always wanted.

They stop at a lavish CATERING SPREAD, stock up on food. Raya
takes a handful of HOTDOGS.
A hand taps Raya on the shoulder. She throws the hotdogs down
like she’s been caught.
The hand belongs to Hutch. She turns to look at him.
HUTCH
Come with me.
Raya looks disconcerted, follows Hutch. Kirsten and the other
girls watch her go.
RAYA
(to Hutch)
Is everything okay?
He doesn’t reply.
INT. ELEVATOR - MOMENTS LATER
Raya stands beside Hutch. The elevator doors open.
INT. SUPERDOME - BACKSTAGE CORRIDOR - MOMENTS LATER110 110
Raya follows Hutch down a corridor.
They stop outside a DRESSING ROOM. A BURLY SECURITY GUY opens
the door.
Hutch looks at Raya, gestures inside. She hesitatingly
enters, confused -- watches Hutch as he walks away...
INT. DRESSING ROOM - CONTINUOUS111 111
Raya takes in the plush surroundings: leather sofas, lamps,
candles, treadmill, buffet of food and beverage.

EXT. MOTEL - SUNRISE114 114
Raya sits outside, wrapped in the blanket. Watches the
sunrise pensively.
INT. W.A.W. GYM - DAY115 115
Roy looks on as Zak supervises Calum and Paulie in the ring.
Calum, cool and confident now, throws Paulie off the ropes.
Calum bounces back -- clotheslines Paulie. The Strays watch
at the apron, applaud.
Calum climbs the TURNBUCKLE. Stands astride it. Wobbles
nervously.
ZAK
You got it...
Calum pauses -- then MOONSAULTS off, landing on top of
Paulie, both crashing to the mat.
Roy leans forward -- what the fuck?
Paulie and Calum get to their feet, grinning with glee. WILD
APPLAUSE from the Strays -- as Roy shakes his head in
disbelief.
EXT. BRITANNIA ROAD - NORWICH HILLSIDE - DAY
Zak and Roy jog up the hill.
They reach the top, sucking in air, looking out at their
hometown.
